chunks.title: Eliphaz's Rebuke and Challenge
chunks.reason: Eliphaz opens his speech by challenging Job's reaction to suffering while reminding him of his past strength.

chunks.title: The Principle of Retribution
chunks.reason: Eliphaz presents a general argument about the fate of the wicked using agricultural and lion metaphors.

chunks.title: The Night Vision and Divine Oracle
chunks.reason: Eliphaz recounts a terrifying vision where a spirit delivers an oracle emphasizing human frailty before God.
